title: CaseKhaitanLinTyrrellYuan
summary: Assembles the formal finite-part identity corresponding to Theorem 1.4 from explicit evaluation, recursion, divergence, and renormalization interfaces.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Assembles the formal finite-part identity corresponding to Theorem 1.4 from explicit evaluation, recursion, divergence, and renormalization interfaces.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/PE/Applications/CaseKhaitanLinTyrrellYuan.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: double Factorial. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def doubleFactorial : Nat -> Nat | 0 => 1 | 1 => 1 | n + 2 => (n + 2) * doubleFactorial n

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: double Factorial pos. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem doubleFactorial_pos : forall n : Nat, 0 < doubleFactorial n | 0 => by simp [doubleFactorial] | 1 => by simp [doubleFactorial] | n + 2 => by simp [doubleFactorial, doubleFactorial_pos n]

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: double Factorial ne zero. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: critical Case Multiplier Q. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: Case Coeff. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Formal proposition: critical Case Multiplier Q pos. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem criticalCaseMultiplierQ_pos (n k : Nat) : 0 < criticalCaseMultiplierQ n k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: Case Coeff mul critical Case Multiplier. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem CaseCoeff_mul_criticalCaseMultiplier (n k : Nat) : CaseCoeff n k * ((criticalCaseMultiplierQ n k : Rat) : Real) = 1

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: Case Coeff eq closed Form. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem CaseCoeff_eq_closedForm (n k : Nat) : CaseCoeff n k = (Nat.factorial (k - 1) : Real) / ((2 : Real) ^ (n / 2 - k) * (Nat.factorial (n / 2 - 1) : Real)
